'''Drekker''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory Station]] owned by [[Drekker Industries]] used for the production of valuable crystals in the [[Yerej system/Legends|Yerej system]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it came under [[Battle of Yerej|attack]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]], the ''[[Meteor (frigate)|Meteor]]'', and its squadrons of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Fortunately, the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Inexorable (Victory-class)|''Inexorable'']] was able to intervene and protect ''Drekker''. The factory had two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda shuttles]] called ''[[Fubarium]]'' and ''[[Tymtogo]]'' that were to be used to evacuate the station should it fall under heavy attack.

{{Station-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Because it appears in one of the missions of the Rebel Alliance [[Operation: Quick Strike]], the factory itself and the Rebel attack are canon. However, the outcome of the attack depends on the player's actions; there is no canonical answer to it. As a result, while the existence of the factory and the Rebel attack are confirmed canon, the destruction at the hand of the Rebels is not and the factory must be assumed to have survived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
